meta.title: PT Services - VISA, Travel & Service Agency in Thailand
meta.description: Service agency based in Bangkok specialized in visa assistance, travel planning, flight tickets booking, accomodations booking, and immigration procedures.

servicesDropdown.label: Document Translation and Consular Legalization for Marriage Registration

hero.title: ONE-STOP SERVICES AGENCY
hero.description: We are an agency specialized in visa and immigration assistance, travel planning, and personalized support in Bangkok, Thailand.
hero.testimonialQuote: This agency helped my girlfriend get her schengen visa for our summer holiday and service was top notch.

visa.heading: Visa assistance
visa.description: Getting a visa can be a tough process and visa refusal costs not only time but also money. Our agency is specialized in visa procedures and can help you to get your visa. Whether you need a tourist, business, student, or work visa, we provide expert and comprehensive assistance. Our expert team ensures that you meet all the requirements, handles all the paperwork, prepares you for embassy interviews, and deals with the embassies for you. We streamline the visa acquisition process, making it faster and easier for you.
visa.guaranteeText: If your visa application is denied, we will issue a full refund of our service fee.

immigration.heading: Immigration assistance
immigration.description: When in a foreign country, immigration rules can be intimidating and complex, and failing to comply with those rules can have tremendous consequences. This is where an agency can be useful to help you complete your immigration procedures correctly. Our agency specializes in assisting foreigners with their immigration processes, from the essential 90-Day report in Thailand to more complex immigration procedures. Our team ensures compliance with local regulations, handles the paperwork, and manages communication with immigration authorities on your behalf.

items.title: 90-Day Report for Foreigners
items.description: We provide an extra convenient 90-Day report service for foreigners in Thailand. We charge between THB 1,000 and THB 1,500 depending on how far our agents need to come pickup your documents from the Asok area in Bangkok.

items.title: Hospital Accompaniment
items.description: If you need someone to accompany you or someone else to the hospital, we can assign an agent who will take care of the patient throughout the day. Our agent can transport the patients to the hospital, stay by their side, handle all necessary paperwork, and transport the persons back to their residence after the visit.

items.title: Bank procedures assistance
items.description: Do you need help opening a bank account in Thailand? Whether you're a Thai national or a foreigner, we can help you get your banking set up quickly and easily. Count on our expertise to guide you through every step.

items.title: Travel Planning
items.description: If you don't want to spend time planning your trip, you can delegate this to our professional team. We take care of booking your flights, accommodations, and train tickets, and we can also guide you in selecting travel insurance that fits your journey.

items.title: Personal assistant
items.description: Do you need any assistance and to delegate some tasks on a weekly or monthly basis? We can assign one or more of our personal assistants to you. With a personal assistant you will get more time for your family or business and you will reduce your mental load.

items.title: Do you need a specific service?
items.description: If you need help for any paperwork, such as renewing a Thai driver license, getting a police certificate or on any task that can be delegated, our team can help. Contact us and we will do our best to help you.
